age_range.evidence: The present study examined these direct and indirect relationships among a sample of 385 adolescents (mean age 15.62 years, range 14–18 years).

countries.evidence: Participants were recruited from a high school in a north-western region of Turkey.

gender_split.evidence: A total of 385 adolescent social media users, aged between 14 and 18 years (M = 15.62 years, SD = 1.00, 57% female), participated in the study. [Table 1] Male 57(222) Female 43(164)

sample_size.evidence: A total of 385 adolescent social media users, aged between 14 and 18 years (M = 15.62 years, SD = 1.00, 57% female), participated in the study.
